findings.message: CLAUDE.md Skill Inventory table lists only 7 skills; repo contains 21 skills — 14 skills completely absent from the inventory.
CLAUDE.md Skill Inventory table lists 7 skills; actual repo contains 21 skills across skills/ljg-*/SKILL.md — 14 skills are absent from the table.
Runs npm install which executes postinstall lifecycle scripts from playwright and its transitive dependencies — supply-chain execution risk on first install.
SKILL=$1 is used unsanitized in rsync target path ($REPO/skills/$SKILL). A caller supplying ../../outside-repo with a matching local directory would rsync content outside the skills subtree.
No <example> block present despite skill being user_invocable: true and having seven distinct modes.
playwright dependency uses caret range (^1.58.2) allowing automatic minor and patch version upgrades on every fresh npm install.
No <example> block present.

Skill body references Workflows/Push.md as the authoritative workflow document; directory naming differs from repo convention (references/). File existence was not confirmed.
Same localhost:31337 voice notification pattern as ljg-qa. Fixed payload but assumes a trusted service is bound to that port.
Skill references Workflows/Extract.md and References/QuestionDesign.md; capitalized directory names differ from repo convention. File existence was not confirmed.
Skill instructs Claude to POST to localhost:31337 as a voice notification side-effect on every execution. Any local process can bind that port; fixed payload but undocumented runtime dependency.
